violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Shelving and interior of large prep cooler in front area needs routine cleaning.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids. (lids are up)
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mop noted in sink needs hung to air dry.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided by womens toilets.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Areas of ceiling in kitchen need cleaning. Wet-stained ceiling tiles noted in restrooms need replacement. ( Also repair any water leaks above these tiles )
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained needs routine cleaning. Prep cooler interior needs cleaning. Prep top needs cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Shelving inside Bev-Air reachin cooler noted not in good repair.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids. (lids are up)

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor areas mainly beneath cooking equipment needs cleaning. Ceiling vent covers need cleaning. Wall behind handsink needs repair. One ceiling tile in each restroom needs replaced. ( check for water leaks above for repair )
